home.location_intro: Potamoula is located in Makryneia, Aetolia-Acarnania, near Lake Trichonida and at the foothills of Mount Arakynthos. It is a characteristic semi-mountainous village of the region.
home.hero_subtitle: A small village in the heart of nature
home.welcome_text: Potamoula is a semi-mountainous village in Aetolia-Acarnania, built at an altitude of 310 meters on the northern slopes of Mount Arakynthos (Zygos), next to Lake Trichonida, the largest natural lake in Greece. It is 40 km from Agrinio, 41 km from Nafpaktos and 56 km from Messolonghi. The village has been officially recorded since 1835. According to the 2021 census it has 14 permanent residents. The village has two churches, Agia Paraskevi and Agios Nikolaos. Surrounded by lush vegetation and impressive mountains, it offers tranquility, fresh air and an authentic Greek traditional atmosphere.
home.history_text: Potamoula of Makryneia has a long historical presence in Aetolia-Acarnania and represents a characteristic example of a traditional Greek settlement. The village has preserved its customs, traditions and authentic local character over time, remaining a point of reference for residents and visitors.
home.nature_text: Surrounded by lush vegetation, Mount Arakynthos and Lake Trichonida, Potamoula offers remarkable natural beauty. Visitors can enjoy tranquility, fresh air, panoramic views and an authentic Greek traditional atmosphere throughout the year.

info.title: Information
info.contact_text: Cafe-Bar:  Treis kai o Koukos - Tel: +30 2635042764
info.contact_subtitle: Contact the local café for coffee, food, or hospitality, as well as information about opening hours.
info.history_text: Potamoula of Makryneia is a historic settlement in Aetolia-Acarnania and part of the wider Makryneia region. Over time, it has been affected by administrative changes in local government, following reforms from the Kapodistrias plan to the Kallikratis reform. The area has traditionally been based on agriculture and has maintained a close connection with the land and nature. Its proximity to Lake Trichonida and Mount Arakynthos has shaped the lifestyle of its inhabitants, mainly based on farming and livestock. Today, Potamoula preserves the authentic character of a small semi-mountainous village in Aetolia-Acarnania.
info.intro_text: Potamoula of Makryneia is a small traditional village in Aetolia-Acarnania, near Lake Trichonida. This page provides information about its location, history, and key details of the settlement.
info.location_text: Potamoula is located in the Municipal Unit of Makrineia, Municipality of Agrinio, Aetolia-Acarnania. Altitude 310m, south of Lake Trichonida and on the northern slopes of Mount Arakynthos. It is 40 km from Agrinio, 41 km from Nafpaktos and 56 km from Messolonghi. Area code: 26350.
